display_name: Vercel React/Next.js best practices (72 rules / 8 categories)

depends_on: compiled AGENTS.md = concatenation of rules/*.md is the deployed skill content
rules/ directory layout + SKILL.md index contract
break_if: upstream restructures rules/ or stops committing the compiled AGENTS.md
skill frontmatter name changes away from vercel-react-best-practices
MAJOR change to the rule/section format

notes: Multi-file skill absorbed verbatim (cp -R). drift_probe tracks the compiled AGENTS.md blob as a de-facto tree hash: upstream's build package keeps AGENTS.md in sync with rules/, so any rule change moves this blob. Engine has no tree-hash kind; single-path blob is the faithful substitute.
